selections.name: Tatakai Uta
selections.reason: Fitter second-up after a solid 2nd at Bendigo. Leading contender with the inside draw.

selections.name: Scoobartie
selections.reason: Tough to beat after a close 2nd at this track last start. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Havana Moon
selections.reason: Looks set for a big run following a strong 2nd at Ballarat. Consistent form.

selections.name: Boyd
selections.reason: Third-up today and has placed third-up previously. Don't underestimate from a good gate.

danger_horse.name: Hello Mistress
danger_horse.reason: Tested in a strong race after a good debut run. Capable of surprising.

selections.name: King's Anchor
selections.reason: Fitter second-up after a narrow defeat at Bendigo. Leading contender.

selections.name: Hopeless Romantic
selections.reason: Leading prospect after a strong 2nd at Echuca. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Boulderoo
selections.reason: Heading in the right direction and looks hard to beat after a close 2nd last start.

selections.name: Zetheros
selections.reason: Rates highly with a little improvement. Can overcome the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Angel's Gathering
danger_horse.reason: Among the leading chances after a solid 3rd at Stawell.

selections.name: Broken Image
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Sure to be right there at the business end.

selections.name: Saraya
selections.reason: Right in contention after a narrow defeat at Corowa. Ready to win.

selections.name: Malawi Man
selections.reason: Anticipating a big run after a solid 4th at Hamilton. Consistent performer.

selections.name: Specky Boy
selections.reason: Profiles very well for a maiden of this nature. Making headway.

danger_horse.name: Tornado Anwa
danger_horse.reason: On the back-up after a nice third on Thursday. Can feature.

selections.name: El James
selections.reason: Key runner who should be in the finish. Strong form over distance.

selections.name: Jaykayann
selections.reason: Definite winning chance. Looks to have come back well and ready for this trip.

selections.name: Unseen Ruler
selections.reason: Profiles well for this after a solid run at Sandown-Hillside.

selections.name: Lodbrok
selections.reason: Strong stayer who can feature prominently from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Wuddzz
danger_horse.reason: Chances enhanced big time if the track comes up Heavy.

selections.name: Shining Smile
selections.reason: Easiest race he's been in for a while. Class drop makes him the one to beat.

selections.name: Per Sempre
selections.reason: Shaping up nicely and can go on with it after a solid 3rd at Sandown.

selections.name: Toronado Boom
selections.reason: Back in great shape and is worth including after a strong win.

selections.name: Surprisatic
selections.reason: Too consistent to dismiss, especially from the good draw.

danger_horse.name: Danceenuff
danger_horse.reason: Expecting a strong run fresh. Has won previously when first up.

selections.name: Cruiserweight
selections.reason: Huge winner at only start in NZ and has been trialling well ahead of the return.

selections.name: Yuuki
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick and sure to measure up here despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Queen Christine
selections.reason: Rates highly. One of the major players, even more so if we get a Heavy track.

selections.name: Zoulette
selections.reason: Solid credentials and certainly worth including after a good 3rd at Ballarat.

danger_horse.name: Doubtland Diva
danger_horse.reason: Good winner two back then not beaten far last time, so can bounce back.

selections.name: Vivacissimo
selections.reason: Capable of a better showing and will take plenty of beating here.

selections.name: Boltsaver
selections.reason: Cherry-ripe and will be hard to hold out after a close 2nd at Warrnambool.

selections.name: Join The Que
selections.reason: Racing well at the moment and could be hard to beat despite the gate.

selections.name: Some People Callme
selections.reason: Strips fitter and is well-placed to take this out from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Brave Mission
danger_horse.reason: Import on debut in Aus and has trialled well. Watch betting.

selections.name: Cartoon Graveyard
selections.reason: Just missed behind a handy one last weekend at Caulfield. Top pick.

selections.name: Electric Impulse
selections.reason: Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time from the rail.

selections.name: Seafall
selections.reason: Racing well and can feature again after a strong win at Sandown.

selections.name: Fine Future
selections.reason: Big chance to bounce straight back after a solid 4th in Group 3 company.

danger_horse.name: Black Storm
danger_horse.reason: Spotting race fitness to all rivals, but flies first-up.
